title: Board Activity Log does not capture updates on custom columns
excerpt: When an update is made on a newly created column for an item, the event does not appear on the activity log. Only updates made on default columns is visible (i.e. Name, Person, Status, Date). Is there a way updates on cu…

posts.author: aditya.mandavi (Aditya)
posts.cookedHtml: When an update is made on a newly created column for an item, the event does not appear on the activity log. Only updates made on default columns is visible (i.e. Name, Person, Status, Date). Is there a way updates on custom columns can be tracked?

posts.author: aditya.mandavi (Aditya)
posts.cookedHtml: Found it happens only for ‘Text’ column types. Is there a way we can track ‘Text’ columns as well
